name: Additional Settings
description: Adds useful settings like FPS bypass and layout mode

fps-bypass.name: FPS Bypass
fps-bypass.description: Removes FPS cap for smoother gameplay

fps-limit.name: FPS Limit
fps-limit.description: Maximum frames per second (only works if FPS Bypass is on)

layout-mode.name: Layout Mode
layout-mode.description: Enables editor layout mode without testing

show-fps.name: Show FPS
show-fps.description: Показывает счётчик кадров в углу экрана
